docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,525.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ, KVOTHE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDMAN, SAMUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-14-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDMAN, SAMUEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF KVOTHE SANCHEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAMUEL GOLDMAN IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, KVOTHE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GOLDMAN, SAMUEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.
